title: Maynard Reports the Truth
description: Pages 6–10 focus on maynard reports the truth, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as the former toys and underground prisoners rise into the city, while Doflamingo's officers and the Marines struggle to control the chaos.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I can take care of them all...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It's so... high!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: How does a voice like that come out of that body....?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Fufu- Fufu...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: His voice!!! His voice!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: No need to be so hasty...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It's no good... I can't get used to it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Listen, now. You could call this game...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: mustn't...laugh... if I laugh, I'm a goner...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: ...a form of "election" for the throne of this kingdom.

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: I have asked the people of Dresrosa to choose for them- selves...!!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Which Royal Line deserves to rule this land?! The House of Riku, or the House of Donquixote?! The people will decide! It is their right!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: All we need do is crush those who come to challenge us...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: The rest of the carnage, we can watch at our lei- sure...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Sounds like a pain. Dofi, I think...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Peept!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Ahhhhh!! I...!! I'm very sorry, Pica- Sama!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Please forgive me!! This guy's new here!! He was just taken by surprise, that's all....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: I will bury you alive in the stone.....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: AaaAG- GHH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Wait, Pica- Sama!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: UaaG- HA!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: If you took care of him, there would be no body left. That wouldn't be fair on the dead man's family.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Thank you kindly, baby S....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Aaah- Huh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: At the age of eight, I lost my mother...

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: And at the age of ten, I killed my father.

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: All the officers who serve me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: "...are my "family" who have stood by me through thick and thin.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: They're all I have in the world....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: I won't forgive anyone who laughs at my family...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Is that clear?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Y...Yes, sir!!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Restrain the people who have gone berserk!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Hunt down those pirates!!!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Looks like the Marines don't want to side against us, Oiling!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: So they're still treating the young master as a shichibukai...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: Isn't that a little too con- Venient?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Oooh!! Don't you think they're just scared by this bridge?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: more to the point, where the hell has that pervert got to?

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: I'm surprised he still had the strength to run...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: pant

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: Thanks to the Reserve Cola I was saving for destroying the factory, I'm back in action!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: That must be the smile factory up ahead!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: look at the stupid thing, not even trying to hide...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Does it want a taste of my beam that bad?!! Gahahah!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: A balloon is falling towards us, oiling!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: A Bal- Loon?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: Buegh!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: WAASH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: Ahhh!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: Law!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: You've got a lot of guts showing your face here, brat!!

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: Big bro Law?! I can barely remember him, haha!!

summary: Maynard Reports the Truth develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
